actions.name: actions/checkout
actions.purpose: Materialize the exact workflow commit without retaining push credentials.
actions.deterministic_impact: The immutable action commit fixes checkout behavior; the checked revision remains GITHUB_SHA.
actions.execution_cost: Hosted JavaScript action only; no Rust compile unit.
rejected_alternatives: Mutable major tags permit workflow code drift.
Handwritten Git checkout adds credential and platform-specific shell surface.

actions.name: actions/setup-node
actions.purpose: Install the exact Node runtime selected by .node-version on every hosted image.
actions.deterministic_impact: The action implementation and requested Node version are both immutable inputs to repository evidence scripts.
actions.execution_cost: Downloads a prebuilt Node runtime when the hosted tool cache lacks 24.15.0; no Rust compile unit.
rejected_alternatives: Runner-default Node changes with hosted images.
Platform-specific installation scripts duplicate trusted download logic.

actions.name: actions/upload-artifact
actions.purpose: Retain the per-profile machine-readable execution evidence produced after a successful gate.
actions.deterministic_impact: Does not affect authoritative simulation; immutable upload behavior preserves the exact evidence file emitted by the job.
actions.execution_cost: Compresses and uploads one small JSON record per profile; no Rust compile unit.
rejected_alternatives: Workflow logs alone do not provide a stable machine-readable profile record.
Mutable action tags permit retention behavior drift.
